mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommendation_history (ns_id, instance_id, recommendation, response_json) VALUES (#{nsId}, #{instanceId}, #{recommendation}, #{responseJson})
mapper.select: SELECT id, ns_id AS nsId, instance_id AS instanceId, recommendation, response_json AS responseJson, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM recommendation_history WHERE ns_id = #{nsId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
